titleStmt.title: SII 8.707: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 707. (A.R. No. 391 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kopperuñciṅkattevar
kku yāṇṭu 3vatu meṣanāyaṟṟu tiyati Irupattañcā nāḷ
taniyūr perumpaṟṟapuliyūr peruṅkaviciyaṉ tirukkaḻippaālai U
ṭaiyāṉ Iraviyum Ivaraiye mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pi
rāmaṇi Ampalattamutu kottalarkuḻaliyum Ivaraiye mutukaṇ
ṇāka Uṭaiya Ivar makaṉ Iravi tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉum
peruṅkaviciyaṉ Iravi tirunaṭṭamāṭiyai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya
ivaṉ pirāmaṇi AṉṉicāraṉProbably aṉanticuraṉ as in line 10 of No. 392 of 1903.kiḻakkaṭaiyaniṉṟāḷum peruṅkava
ciyaṉ Iravi Ampalattamutai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi
tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉ civakāmacuntariyum peruṅkavuciyaṉ Ira
vi cirimulattāṉamuṭaiyāṉum Uḻaiccāṇaṉ viṉāyakaṉ pacupatiyai mutukaṇ
ṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ mātā tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉ tattaiyum Ivaṉe
mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉ koṇ
ṭāḷuṅ Ivvaṉaivom kavuciyaṉ civaṉ tiruciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku nāṅkaḷ ni
lavilaippiramāṇattiṭṭu kuṭuttaparicāvatu . naāṅkaḷ Ivaṟku Iṉṉāyaṟṟu tiyati
patiṉmuṉṟā nāḷ viṟṟu vilaittaravu Eḻutikkuṭuttu yiṟṟaināḷāl vilaippiramāṇat
tiṭṭu Eḻutikkuṭukkum Eṅkaḷ nilam Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai maturāntakapperiḷamai
nāṭṭu muṭṭaiyūṟalāṉa parākkiramacoḻanallūrpāl śrīcuntaravatikku kiḻakkum śrī
vaāṉavaṉmātevivāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu Eṅkaḷ ma
kaḷ vācciyaṉ nāyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārperāl Ikkaṇṇā
ṟṟu yiccatirattum pottakampeṟṟa nilamāy nāṅkaḷ Ivarkaḷpakkal citaṉat tālu
m Apāvattālum nāṅkaḷ peṟṟuṭaiyomāy nāṅkaḷ Aṉupavittu viṟṟuk
kuṭutta nilattukku Ellai cevaṭṭaiyaṟutikku kiḻakkum kaṇṇāṟṟuvākkālukku te
ṟkum kiḻakkum tirukkāḷīcuramuṭaiya nāyanār nilattukku teṟkum tirucciṟṟampalava
tikku meṟkum vāṉavaṉmātevivāykkālukku vaṭakkum Āka yicainta yiṉnāṉkel
laiyilum Uṭpaṭa karuttaḷavāka mikutikkuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka vanta viḷainilaṅkaḷum ko
llaikaḷum kuḷaṅkaḷum vāykkālkaḷum Uṭpaṭa vakaiyāṉa nilam 2 I4� I
ṉnilam Iraṇṭaraiye nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikai ciṉṉattil nāṅkaḷ muṉnāḷile
vācciyaṉ tirunaṭṭapperumā ḷuḷḷiṭṭāṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukuṭutta Olai
ppaṭikaḷāl vanta viḷainilaṅkaḷum kollaikaḷum kuḷaṅkaḷil Ivar pātiyum viṟṟa Ō
laippaṭikaḷāl nikkiṉa nilam I4 kikha � nikki nikki Eṅkaḷ nilam 2� kī Isa
m Iṉnilam Iraṇṭe Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭu māviṉ ciṉṉattai mikuti
kkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka vanta viḷainilam vaupa Iṉnilam Eḻumāvum vaṭakiḻaimulaiyil ko
llaitiruttāṉa viḷainilam Araimāvum Innilattukku vaṭakiḻaimulaiyil
nirnilaiyum kiṟāyum Itil Uṭpaṭṭa kuḷaṅkaḷilum mallikaikollaikaḷum Uḷ
ppaṭa vanta nilam Iraṇṭe Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭu māviṉ ciṉṉattaiā portion is missing at the ends of lines 36 to 39.
paṭicompātiyāl vanta kuḷamum karaiyum turavil compātiyum Uḷpaṭa vanta nilamum kollaiyu
ṉṉattaiyum viṟṟu vilaipramā ṇatiṭṭu Eḻutikkuṭuttom Inta kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiya
ṭaya Ivar pirāma
Digital edition of SII 8.707 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
